heroHeadline: From Popular Unity to Pinochet — And Now: Accountability Under Threat
heroSubtitle: After 50 years of justice work, Chile's new Pinochet-admiring president and a Senate commutation bill threaten to free 370+ convicted torturers and murderers still imprisoned
footerNote: Data sourced from Valech Report, Rettig Commission, Vicaría de la Solidaridad, US FOIA declassified documents, Chilean Archivo Nacional, and ongoing judicial proceedings
